# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 218.852 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.9597
  biquad b0=1.00126461652 b1=-1.99366454407 b2=0.992604467461 a1=-1.99366454407 a2=0.993869083981

  biquad b0=1.00287163533 b1=-1.97336583648 b2=0.983206551429 a1=-1.97336583648 a2=0.986078186755
